name: Artichoke Frittata
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare artichokes by cutting them into 1/2-inch cubes (see recipe for Young Artichokes and Fava Beans Stewed in Olive Oil).
2. Heat olive oil in a medium-sized, heavy-bottomed skillet over medium heat.
3. Add garlic and sauté until translucent, about 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Reduce heat slightly and add artichoke cubes; sauté until tender, about 10 minutes, stirring often.
5. Add grated potatoes and cook for another 5 minutes.
6. Stir in eggs, salt, pepper, and herbs.
7. Allow the eggs to set by cooking for 2 or 3 minutes without stirring. Lift the edges and tilt the skillet slightly to let any uncooked egg run underneath. Repeat until fully set.
8. Serve hot or cold, cut into wedges.
